briefing_zh:
今天 AI 研究的焦点集中在**具身智能**和**高效推理**两大方向。**NVIDIA Cosmos 3** 发布了全模态开源模型，覆盖语言、图像、视频、音频和动作，在 48 项理解 benchmark 上表现领先，标志着开源多模态进入新阶段。**Humanoid-GPT** 用 GPT 风格 Transformer 在 20 亿帧运动数据上训练，实现零样本全身运动追踪，将大规模语言模型的 scaling 范式引入人形机器人控制。

在检索增强生成领域，**OCC-RAG** 提出了最优认知核心架构，以 72 票登顶 HuggingFace 日榜，说明社区对 RAG 忠实性问题的高度关注。**KVarN** 则针对长链推理场景的 KV-cache 量化误差累积问题给出方差归一化方案，直击 test-time scaling 的内存瓶颈。

工程实践方面，Stanford CS336 课程公开的 **AI Agent Guidelines (CLAUDE.md)** 在 Hacker News 获得 499 分热度，反映出学术界开始系统性地规范 AI agent 的使用方式。Microsoft 发布基于 OpenClaw 的自主 agent **Scout**，信号明确：大厂正加速将 agent 产品化。
briefing_en:
Today's AI research converges on **embodied intelligence** and **efficient reasoning**. **NVIDIA Cosmos 3** drops an omnimodal open-source model spanning language, image, video, audio, and action modalities, leading on 48 understanding benchmarks — a milestone for open-source multimodal AI. **Humanoid-GPT** brings GPT-style scaling to humanoid robotics with a billion-frame motion corpus enabling zero-shot whole-body tracking.

In retrieval-augmented generation, **OCC-RAG** proposes an Optimal Cognitive Core architecture and tops HuggingFace daily papers with 72 upvotes, signaling strong community demand for faithful RAG. **KVarN** tackles the memory bottleneck of test-time scaling by introducing variance-normalized KV-cache quantization that mitigates error accumulation in long-horizon reasoning.

On the engineering side, Stanford CS336's public **AI Agent Guidelines (CLAUDE.md)** hit 499 points on Hacker News, reflecting academia's move to systematically codify agent usage norms. Microsoft's launch of **Scout**, an autonomous agent built on OpenClaw, signals accelerating productization of AI agents by big tech.
viral_analysis_zh: Stanford CS336 的 CLAUDE.md 最具病毒传播潜力——它满足了开发者对「如何正确使用 AI agent」的刚需，且以课程作业形式降低了传播门槛。499 分 + 153 评论的 HN 数据已经验证了这一点。
viral_analysis_en: Stanford CS336's CLAUDE.md has the highest viral potential — it addresses developers' urgent need for 'how to properly use AI agents' and the homework-assignment format lowers the sharing barrier. The 499-point, 153-comment HN traction already validates this.

huggingface_papers.title: OCC-RAG: Optimal Cognitive Core for Faithful Question Answering
huggingface_papers.tldr: Proposes an Optimal Cognitive Core architecture for RAG that improves faithfulness in question answering by selectively routing between parametric knowledge and retrieved context, reducing hallucination in knowledge-intensive tasks.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 提出最优认知核心 RAG 架构，通过在参数知识和检索上下文之间智能路由，提升问答忠实度，减少知识密集型任务中的幻觉问题。
huggingface_papers.authors: Maksim Savkin, Mikhail Goncharov, Alexander Gambashidze

huggingface_papers.title: From Activation to Causality: Discovery of Causal Visual Representations in the Human Brain
huggingface_papers.tldr: Moves beyond correlation-based brain mapping to discover causal visual representations, using interventional techniques to identify which brain regions causally encode visual concepts rather than merely correlate with them.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 突破基于相关性的大脑映射方法，使用介入技术发现因果视觉表征，识别哪些脑区因果性地编码视觉概念而非仅仅相关。
huggingface_papers.authors: Yuval Golbari, Navve Wasserman, Matias Cosarinsky

huggingface_papers.title: Trust Region On-Policy Distillation
huggingface_papers.tldr: Introduces trust region constraints to on-policy distillation for LLMs, achieving +3.34 pts on math and +4.00 pts on code for Qwen3-SFT-1.7B. Broadly applicable to agent learning and model compression.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 将信赖域约束引入 LLM 的 on-policy 蒸馏，在 Qwen3-SFT-1.7B 上数学提升 3.34 分、代码提升 4.00 分，广泛适用于 agent 学习和模型压缩。
huggingface_papers.authors: Xingrun Xing, Haoqing Wang, Boyan Gao

huggingface_papers.title: Humanoid-GPT: Scaling Data and Structure for Zero-Shot Motion Tracking
huggingface_papers.tldr: A GPT-style Transformer trained on a 2-billion-frame motion corpus enables zero-shot whole-body humanoid control. Demonstrates that scaling laws from language models transfer to robotics motion generation.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: GPT 风格 Transformer 在 20 亿帧运动语料上训练，实现零样本全身人形机器人控制，证明语言模型的 scaling law 可迁移到机器人运动生成。
huggingface_papers.authors: Zekun Qi, Xuchuan Chen, Dairu Liu

huggingface_papers.title: KVarN: Variance-Normalized KV-Cache Quantization Mitigates Error Accumulation in Reasoning Tasks
huggingface_papers.tldr: Addresses the memory bottleneck of test-time scaling by normalizing KV-cache channels by variance before quantization, preventing error accumulation during long-horizon reasoning without accuracy loss.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 通过方差归一化 KV-cache 通道后再量化，解决 test-time scaling 的内存瓶颈，防止长链推理中误差累积且不损失精度。
huggingface_papers.authors: Lorenz K. Muller, Philippe Bich, Chiara Boretti

alphaxiv_papers.title: NVIDIA Cosmos 3: Omnimodal World Foundation Model
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Omnimodal foundation model covering language, image, video, audio, and action. Leads on 48 understanding benchmarks and scores 39.7% on RoboLab. Strongest open-source multimodal model to date.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 全模态基础模型覆盖语言、图像、视频、音频和动作，48 项理解 benchmark 领先，RoboLab 39.7%，当前最强开源多模态模型。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Harness-1: RL-Trained Search Agent with Curated Recall
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: A 20B parameter RL-trained search agent achieving 0.730 curated recall, surpassing open-source baselines by 11.4 points across 8 benchmarks. Demonstrates RL can significantly improve retrieval agent quality.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 200 亿参数 RL 训练的搜索 agent，筛选召回率 0.730，在 8 个 benchmark 上超越开源基线 11.4 分，证明 RL 可显著提升检索 agent 质量。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Qwen-VLA: Vision-Language-Action Model for Robotic Manipulation
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Vision-language-action model achieving 56.7% on RoboCasa-GR1, 73.7% on Simpler-WidowX, and 57.5% on VLN-CE navigation. Unifies perception, language understanding, and action generation in one model.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 视觉-语言-动作统一模型，RoboCasa-GR1 达 56.7%、Simpler-WidowX 73.7%、VLN-CE 导航 57.5%，将感知、语言理解和动作生成统一在一个模型中。

alphaxiv_papers.title: WALL-WM: World Action Model with Semantic Action Events
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Replaces fixed-length action chunks with semantic 'action events' in world models, improving manipulation task performance and generalization to unseen scenarios.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 用语义「动作事件」替代固定长度动作块构建世界模型，提升操作任务性能和对未见场景的泛化能力。

alphaxiv_papers.title: VLM³: Expert-Level 3D Understanding from Standard Vision-Language Models
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Shows that standard VLMs can achieve expert-level 3D understanding (depth, pose, correspondence) through focal length unification and text-based pixel referencing, without specialized 3D architectures.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 证明标准 VLM 通过焦距统一和基于文本的像素引用即可达到专家级 3D 理解（深度、姿态、对应），无需专门的 3D 架构。

github_repos.name: DannyMac180/skills
github_repos.tldr: A curated collection of AI agent skills — reusable capability modules that agents can load and execute. Demonstrates the emerging pattern of modular agent toolkits.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 精选 AI agent 技能集合——可复用的能力模块，agent 可加载执行。展示了模块化 agent 工具包的新兴模式。

github_repos.name: PentesterFlow/agent
github_repos.tldr: Agentic offensive security in the terminal — an AI agent that autonomously performs penetration testing tasks, combining LLM reasoning with security tooling.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 终端中的自主攻防安全 agent——AI agent 自主执行渗透测试任务，结合 LLM 推理与安全工具。

github_repos.name: duncatzat/vigils
github_repos.tldr: A local control plane for AI agents built with Rust + Tauri — monitors agent actions, enforces approval gates, and prevents secret leakage via Chrome extension integration.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 基于 Rust + Tauri 的 AI agent 本地控制面板——监控 agent 行为、设置审批门控、通过 Chrome 扩展防止密钥泄露。

github_repos.name: PanisHandsome/ai-rules-sync
github_repos.tldr: Keeps one source of truth for AI coding agent rules — syncs between AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, and Copilot instructions. Solves config fragmentation across AI tools.
github_repos.tldr_zh: AI 编程 agent 规则单一数据源——在 AGENTS.md、CLAUDE.md、.cursorrules 和 Copilot 指令间同步，解决多工具配置碎片化问题。

github_repos.name: ethanhq/cc-fleet
github_repos.tldr: Spawn any vendor LLM (DeepSeek, GLM, Qwen, Kimi, MiniMax) as real Claude Code teammates or one-shot subagents. Enables multi-model collaboration in coding workflows.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 将任意厂商 LLM（DeepSeek、GLM、Qwen、Kimi、MiniMax）作为 Claude Code 真实队友或一次性子 agent 启动，实现编程工作流中的多模型协作。

hackernews.title: AI Agent Guidelines for CS336 at Stanford
hackernews.tldr: Stanford's CS336 course publishes explicit guidelines for using AI agents (specifically Claude) in coursework — covering allowed behaviors, constraints, and interaction patterns. A template for academic AI agent governance.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Stanford CS336 课程发布 AI agent（特别是 Claude）在课程作业中的使用规范——涵盖允许行为、约束和交互模式，成为学术界 AI agent 治理的模板。

hackernews.title: Launch HN: Expanse (YC P26) – Unlock Wasted GPU Capacity
hackernews.tldr: YC-backed startup that aggregates underutilized GPU capacity from data centers, offering cheaper compute for AI training and inference workloads.
hackernews.tldr_zh: YC 投资的初创公司，聚合数据中心闲置 GPU 算力，为 AI 训练和推理负载提供更便宜的计算资源。

hackernews.title: Microsoft announces Scout, an autonomous AI agent built on OpenClaw
hackernews.tldr: Microsoft launches Scout, an autonomous AI agent built on the OpenClaw framework, capable of independent task execution across Microsoft 365 ecosystem. Signals enterprise agent productization.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 微软发布基于 OpenClaw 框架的自主 AI agent Scout，可在 Microsoft 365 生态中独立执行任务，标志着企业级 agent 产品化加速。

hackernews.title: Now AI agents need what RSS does
hackernews.tldr: Argues that AI agents need structured, machine-readable feeds (like RSS) to efficiently consume web content, and that RSS is experiencing a renaissance as agent infrastructure.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 论证 AI agent 需要结构化、机器可读的信息源（如 RSS）来高效消费网络内容，RSS 正作为 agent 基础设施迎来复兴。

hackernews.title: Ask HN: Who wants to be hired? (June 2026)
hackernews.tldr: Monthly hiring thread showing strong demand for AI/ML engineers and agent developers. Many candidates highlight agent-building experience as a key differentiator.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 月度招聘帖显示 AI/ML 工程师和 agent 开发者需求旺盛，许多候选人将 agent 构建经验作为核心竞争力。
